verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Blessed assurance, all is well Things be seem so impossible But I know God cannot fail Just look back and see How many times you were at the end And God delivered you With His mighty hand Blessed assurance, all is well

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You have considered me When the world despised me You have purchased me When I thought I couldn’t be loved Lord I just want to say How much I love You I lift my hands to praise and thank You For I know all of Your promises You will fulfill

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You may be believing For your unsaved loved ones For total healing when the Doctor says nothing else can be done But my Redeemer’s the Physician His report says it’s a finished work So claim every inch of ground The devil stole from you All in God’s Name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This is my story, this is my song Praising my Saviour All the day long This is my story, this is my song Praising my Saviour All the day long

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Blessed assurance all the day long Praising my Saviour all the day long Blessed assurance, all is well
